allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('scripts:', json.dumps\(d.get\('scripts',{}\), indent=2\)\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5000/api/tarot/reading -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"spreadType":"three","cards":[{"card":{"id":"0","name":"愚人","nameEn":"The Fool","suit":"major","arcana":"major","meaning":"新的开始"},"position":0,"orientation":"upright"}],"question":"测试","save":false}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5000/api/tarot/reading -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Authorization: Bearer invalid_token' -d '{"spreadType":"three","cards":[{"card":{"id":"0","name":"愚人","nameEn":"The Fool","suit":"major","arcana":"major","meaning":"新的开始"},"position":0,"orientation":"upright"}],"question":"测试","save":false}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5000/api/tarot/reading -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Accept: text/event-stream' -d '{"spreadType":"three","cards":[{"card":{"id":"0","name":"愚人","nameEn":"The Fool","suit":"major","arcana":"major","meaning":"新的开始"},"position":0,"orientation":"upright"}],"question":"测试","save":false}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5000/api/tarot/reading -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Accept: text/event-stream' -d '{"spreadType":"three","cards":[{"card":{"id":"0","name":"愚人","nameEn":"The Fool","suit":"major","arcana":"major","meaning":"新的开始"},"position":0,"orientation":"upright"}],"question":"测试","save":true}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5000/api/tarot/reading -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"spreadType":"three","cards":[{"card":{"id":"0","name":"愚人","nameEn":"The Fool","suit":"major","arcana":"major","meaning":"新的开始"},"position":0,"orientation":"upright"}],"question":"测试","save":false}')

Bash(node -e "const ko = require\('./cards.ko.json'\); const count = Object.keys\(ko.cards.major\).length + Object.keys\(ko.cards.minor\).length; console.log\('Korean cards:', count, 'cards'\); console.log\('Major:', Object.keys\(ko.cards.major\).length\); console.log\('Minor:', Object.keys\(ko.cards.minor\).length\);")
